2987134.title: A fistful of rubbish
2987134.description: A Western eco documentary set in the Tabernas Desert in Spain, Europe's only desert. An area known for being the backdrop of famous Westerns, sadly, is being trashed. But locals are forming a posse and taking things into their own hands.
